title: Update the Traefik v3 rock from v3.0.0 to v3.7.5
summary: The v3 version subdirectory 3.0.0/rockcraft.yaml pins Traefik to v3.0.0, but upstream stable latest in the 3.x line is v3.7.5 - seven minor releases behind. The 3.0.0 rock also still uses base ubuntu@22.04 while the maintained 2.11.x dir already moved to ubuntu@26.04.
why_good_first_issue: Follows the repo's per-version-subdirectory pattern; primarily a version + source-tag bump (create a 3.7.5/ dir). Clear, verifiable upstream comparison; good first exposure to the rock's build structure.
affected_files: 3.0.0/rockcraft.yaml (version: "3.0.0", two source-tag: "v3.0.0" occurrences, npm-node-version: 14.16); new 3.7.5/ subdirectory
repro_steps: gh api repos/canonical/traefik-rock/contents/3.0.0/rockcraft.yaml --jq .content | base64 -d; gh api repos/traefik/traefik/releases/latest --jq .tag_name
repro_result: 3.0.0/rockcraft.yaml: version: "3.0.0", source-tag: "v3.0.0" (x2), base: ubuntu@22.04, npm-node-version: 14.16. Upstream releases/latest = v3.7.5 (prerelease=false, published 2026-06-10); tags v3.7.1..v3.7.5 exist. The newest tracked v3 dir is 7 minor releases behind upstream stable.
fix_hint: Create a 3.7.5/ directory mirroring 3.0.0/ (or latest 2.11.x layout), set version: "3.7.5" and both source-tag occurrences to "v3.7.5". Re-check npm-node-version (14.16 is very old) and consider base: ubuntu@24.04/26.04 as the 2.11.49 dir uses 26.04. Verify the v3 webui build still works with the pinned node version.
notes: Per-version subdirectory layout; dirs span 2.10.4 .. 3.0.0. v3 track is the most stale. Open issues (#88/#90 etc.) are auto-generated CVE reports, not beginner-friendly.

title: Bump Traefik v2 rock from v2.11.49 to v2.11.50
summary: The newest v2 subdirectory 2.11.49/rockcraft.yaml pins Traefik to v2.11.49, but upstream has v2.11.50 in the 2.11 line. Trivial patch bump on the maintained v2 LTS track.
why_good_first_issue: Single-patch mechanical bump in the existing newest v2 directory; minimal change surface; easy upstream verification.
affected_files: 2.11.49/rockcraft.yaml (version: "2.11.49", two source-tag: "v2.11.49" occurrences); optionally a new 2.11.50/ dir per repo convention
repro_steps: gh api repos/canonical/traefik-rock/contents/2.11.49/rockcraft.yaml --jq .content | base64 -d; gh api repos/traefik/traefik/git/refs/tags --jq '.[].ref' | grep v2.11
repro_result: 2.11.49/rockcraft.yaml: version: "2.11.49", source-tag: "v2.11.49" (x2), base: ubuntu@26.04. Upstream tag v2.11.50 exists (latest in the 2.11 series). Rock lags upstream v2 LTS by one patch.
fix_hint: Following the repo's per-version-dir pattern, create a 2.11.50/ directory mirroring 2.11.49/ and set version + both source-tag occurrences to v2.11.50.
notes: Secondary pick. Upstream global latest is v3.7.5; this addresses only the maintained v2 LTS line.
